   div class  hds-media-wrapper margin-left-auto margin-right-auto    figure class  hds-media-inner hds-cover-wrapper hds-media-ratio-none    a href    h 480 fit clip crop faces 2Cfocalpoint  rel  noopener   img fetchpriority  high  decoding  async  width  720  height  480  src    h 480 fit clip crop faces 2Cfocalpoint  class  attachment-2048x2048 size-2048x2048  alt  A satellite image of southern Florida shows white-gray smoke east of the coastal city of Naples. Winds carry the plume northward toward Lake Okeechobee.  style  transform  scale 1   transform-origin  50  50   object-position  50  50   object-fit  cover   block_context  nasa-block  loading  eager  srcset    h 480 fit crop crop faces 2Cfocalpoint 720w,   h 200 fit crop crop faces 2Cfocalpoint 300w,   h 267 fit crop crop faces 2Cfocalpoint 400w,   h 400 fit crop crop faces 2Cfocalpoint 600w  sizes  auto,  max-width  720px  100vw, 720px      a   figure  figcaption class  hds-caption padding-y-2    div class  hds-caption-text p-sm margin-0  February 25, 2026  div    figcaption   div    div    div   p On February 22, 2026, a wildland fire was discovered in Big Cypress National Preserve, about 25 miles  40 kilometers  east of Naples, Florida. The blaze, dubbed the National fire, moved through dry vegetation and sent a plume of smoke billowing over parts of the preserve and nearby communities.   p   p The  a href    rel  noopener  MODIS  a   Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer  on NASA s  a href    rel  noopener  Aqua  a  satellite captured this image on the afternoon of February 25. By then, the fire had burned around 24,000 acres  9,700 hectares ,  a href    rel  noopener  according to the National Park Service  a .  p   p After carrying smoke southward in previous days,  a href    shifted to start pushing it north by the time Aqua captured this image. According to news reports, the smoke  a href    rel  noopener  reduced visibility  a  and led to the  a href    rel  noopener  brief closure  a  of I-75 the interstate nicknamed  Alligator Alley  that runs east-west through the northern part of the preserve. It also contributed to  a href    rel  noopener  smog over Lake Okeechobee  a .   p   p The fire continued to spread over the next several days, reaching just over 35,000 acres  14,000 hectares  by February 28, according to  a href    rel  noopener  InciWeb  a . As of March 2, it remained roughly the same size and was 38 percent contained.   p   p The fire s cause remains under investigation.  a href    rel  noopener  Officials noted  a , however, that its spread was driven by ample  a href    rel  noopener  fuel  a , including vegetation that was dry from persistent,  a href    rel  noopener  extreme drought  a  and damaged by recent frost. The National Interagency Fire Center s  a href    rel  noopener  wildland fire outlook  a  calls for above-normal fire potential across Florida through May.  p   div style  height 30px  aria-hidden  true  class  wp-block-spacer    div   p  em NASA Earth Observatory image by Lauren Dauphin, using MODIS data from NASA  a href    rel  noopener  EOSDIS LANCE  a  and  a href    rel  noopener  GIBS Worldview  a .
